tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: current_phase remains 0 after all phase1 steps complete and gate check passes - U-D regression confirmation: no script auto-advances .current_phase. Recorded as Medium per runbook (still-open prior-sweep bug).

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all phase1_architecture steps and running check-phase-gate.sh (exit 0), inspect .claude/phase-state.json: .current_phase still equals 0.
framework_bugs.expected: After Phase 1 gate passes and approval is logged, .current_phase should advance to 1 (or to 2 when crossing the Phase 1->2 gate).
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase stayed at 0. check-phase-gate.sh runs only a consistency check; no script in scripts/ writes .current_phase from N to N+1.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after all 5 build-loop steps complete

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: shell-direct `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` succeeded with no Build Loop. PreToolUse hook is not invoked when running git directly from a shell; bypass is the documented U-C still-open bug.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 + --complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, started uat-feat-2 with full new build loop and committed feat(uat-2) successfully. PR #17 grace-window reset works.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json with valid schema (question/options/recommendation/offered_at). pre-commit-gate.sh on simulated PreToolUse stdin returned permissionDecision: deny with rich reason.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed sentinel; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh invocation returned empty stdout (allow).

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: jq '.features_completed' .claude/build-progress.json contains 'uat-feat-1' (and later 'uat-feat-2')

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: shell-direct git commit bypasses BL-006 gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: From project dir with no active build loop and feat: subject (e.g., `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'`), commit succeeds. PreToolUse hook is not engaged from a non-Claude shell.
framework_bugs.expected: Per BL-006 / BL-010, feat: commits without a recorded build loop should be blocked.
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeded. No git commit-msg hook is installed by init.sh, so the only enforcement path is Claude Code PreToolUse, which doesn't fire for direct shell git invocations.

documentation_gaps.gap: BL-006 enforcement is single-channel (PreToolUse only). When users run git from shells/IDEs, no commit-msg hook intercepts feat: commits. README/builders-guide should call this out and link to U-C / BL-010 follow-up.

summary: Base private_poc/web/full ran clean: PR #16-#19 fixes verified (BL-015 sentinel block+resolve, BL-006 grace-window reset, U-H helpers copied, U-N/U-O framework-self guard, fake-remote tolerance, init.sh --non-interactive). Two known-open Medium bugs reconfirmed: U-D (no current_phase advancer) and U-C (shell-direct git bypasses BL-006). Phase 4 correctly blocked for POC scenario.
